full_text:
Lu Yun (Shilong) 陸雲 (士龍)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Yun (陸雲), styledShilong (士龍). Son of Lu Kang. Served Wu and later Jin. Executed during the War of the Eight Princes. Lu Yun was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Lu Yun lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
